line_preview: twoway__histogram_gen t_stat_sm if t_stat_sm < 20.0, start(0) width(0.1) gen(obs x)
kdensity t_stat_sm if t_stat_sm < 20.0 , width(0.1) gen(d_obs) at(x)
twoway__histogram_gen t if t < 20.0, start(0) width(0.1) gen(`k' x)
kdensity t if t < 20.0, width(0.1) gen(d_`k') at(x)
twoway bar obs x if x < 10, barwidth(0.1) color($kolor) fintensity(inten100) || ///
line norm x if x < 10 & norm < 0.2, lcolor(black) lwidth(medthick) text(0.1 1.6 "Normal", place(sw)) || ///
line student_100 x if x < 10 & student_100 < 0.35, lcolor(black) lwidth(medthick) text(0.3 1.5 "Student(100)", place(ne)) || ///
line student_1 x if x < 10 & student_1 < 0.4, lcolor(black) lwidth(medthick) text(0.38 0.9 "Student(1)", place(se)) ///
twoway bar obs x if inrange(x,5,20), barwidth(0.1) color($kolor) fintensity(inten100) || ///
line norm x if inrange(x,5,20), lcolor(black) lwidth(medthick) || ///
line student_100 x if inrange(x,5,20), lcolor(black) lwidth(medthick) text(0.3 1.5 "Student(100)", place(ne)) || ///
pcarrowi 0.02 12 0.0005 11, lcolor(black) mc(black) text(0.02 12 "Normal and Student(100)", place(ne)) || ///
line student_1 x if inrange(x,5,20), lcolor(black) lwidth(medthick) || ///
twoway bar obs x if x < 10, barwidth(0.1) color($kolor) fintensity(inten100) || ///
line cauchy_2 x if x < 10 & cauchy_2 < 0.3, lcolor(black) || ///
line cauchy_15 x if x < 10 & cauchy_15 < 0.4, lcolor(black) text(0.35 0.8 "Cauchy(1.5)", place(se)) || ///
line cauchy_05 x if x < 10 & cauchy_05 < 0.2, lcolor(black) text(0.1 1.8 "Cauchy(0.5)", place(sw)) ///
